title: Governed Interpretation and Capability-Isolated Model Use
description: Resolve interpretation and construct purpose-limited, privacy-filtered, authority-bound model-use packages through isolated TEST and separately authorized PRODUCTION dispatch boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Interpretation resolution is deterministic across context, time, transition state, confidence, restrictions, authority, and purpose
Typed model-use directives are attributable, purpose-bound, versioned, and explicit about transition inclusion
Inapplicable, retracted, expired, superseded, disputed, private, unredacted, revoked, or unauthorized state cannot control downstream behavior
TEST adapters lack transport, credentials, endpoints, callbacks, or generic adapter injection capability
PRODUCTION dispatch requires exact package hashes, recognized authority, privacy filtering, explicit transport, provider-effect journaling, and immutable receipts
Prediction and model output remain downstream, noncanonical, and unable to mutate Enki state without a separate governed operation
